issues.title: Missing organization scoping in ApplicationCreateForm
issues.attack: Plan never passes organization= to ApplicationCreateForm, leaving candidate queryset unscoped across tenants.
issues.response: Valid. Existing codebase uses @membership_required + _get_org(). Plan must follow same pattern.

issues.title: Race condition in check-then-create for Application
issues.attack: exists() then create() without atomic block. Concurrent requests bypass duplicate check.
issues.response: DB UniqueConstraint exists as safety net preventing data corruption. Accept fix: use atomic+IntegrityError instead of exists().

issues.title: No service layer for Application creation
issues.attack: Direct Application.objects.create() in view bypasses closed-project guard and creates architectural inconsistency.
issues.response: Valid. Create create_application() service. Both web and voice views must call it.

issues.title: No error handling for lifecycle service exceptions
issues.attack: drop/restore/hire/complete/skip/reschedule raise ValueError but plan has zero try/except.
issues.response: Valid. All lifecycle calls must be wrapped in try/except ValueError returning 400/409.

issues.title: Silent success on invalid form in skip/reschedule
issues.attack: Invalid form followed by unconditional 200 card response makes user think action succeeded.
issues.response: Valid. Invalid form must return 400 with form errors.

issues.title: action_propose_next lacks validation and transaction
issues.attack: No parent-action status check, no transaction wrapping, silent skip of invalid types allows partial state.
issues.response: Valid. Must verify action.status==DONE, validate IDs, wrap in atomic().

issues.title: HTMX redirect breaks modal/partial flows
issues.attack: Django redirect() in HTMX context swaps full page into modal target.
issues.response: Valid. Use HX-Redirect header for HTMX requests.

issues.title: Missing placeholder templates
issues.attack: Plan renders 8+ partials that don't exist. TemplateDoesNotExist on first call.
issues.response: Valid. Add task to create minimal placeholder partials, matching Phase 3a pattern.

issues.title: Modal GET endpoints missing
issues.attack: Views are @require_POST but HTMX modals need GET to render form.
issues.response: Valid. Add GET method branches following existing codebase pattern.

issues.title: No HX-Trigger strategy for dependent regions
issues.attack: Mutations don't emit HX-Trigger events. Timeline, badges, lists stay stale.

issues.title: Incomplete legacy removal — tab views still reference deleted routes
issues.attack: Removing URL routes while templates still have {% url %} tags → NoReverseMatch.
issues.response: Accept route removal must be paired with tab view/template updates. Remove/stub tab_contacts, tab_offers. Full template migration stays Phase 4.

issues.title: Voice service layer not addressed
issues.attack: action_executor.py has active contact_record, contact_reserve, offer_create handlers using deleted models.
issues.response: Accept scope expansion needed. Disable legacy voice intents in action_executor.py and intent_parser.py. Full migration is future work.

issues.title: Incorrect ProjectStatus grep criterion
issues.attack: Plan says grep ProjectStatus → 0 but it's a valid live enum used in project_close/reopen.
issues.response: Valid. Narrow to Contact/Offer references only.

issues.title: Weak verification/test plan
issues.attack: Only manage.py check + 200 smoke. No tests for error paths.
issues.response: Accept basic error-path tests needed. Full test suite is Phase 5.

issues.title: Inconsistent GET/POST context in action_create
issues.attack: GET sends action_types, POST sends form. Template gets different shapes.
issues.response: Valid minor issue. Use consistent form object.

issues.title: Response shapes don't match HTMX target/swap strategy
issues.attack: No defined contract for what DOM node each response updates.
issues.response: Accept need for response contracts in view docstrings. Detailed hx-target/hx-swap is Phase 4.
